0.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Band atelectasis in the lower lobes

2.text: Bronchiectasis in the right lower lobe

3.text: Atelectasis in the right lower lobe

4.text: Bronchial wall thickening in the right lower lobe

5.text: Subpleural fibrotic changes in the right lower lobe

6.text: Minimal focal ground glass opacities in the right middle lobe

7.text: Minimal focal ground glass opacities in the left lower lobe

8.text: Several nodules up to 5 mm in diameter in both lungs
